purpose: SoloDeck synthetic data for testing causal insight, auto-insights, similarity, product variants, feedback, and beta testing.

ground_truth_mechanisms.platform: douyin has higher exposure but lower conversion; xiaohongshu has higher favorite rate; wechat has stronger conversion; bilibili has stronger comments/long-form engagement.
ground_truth_mechanisms.title_style: pain_point increases views; tutorial increases favorites; case_study and result_oriented increase conversions.
ground_truth_mechanisms.series_fatigue: repeated similar items in math/AI series gradually reduce novelty and increase fatigue risk.
ground_truth_mechanisms.account_confounding: accounts differ in follower base and authority; naive comparisons are biased.
ground_truth_mechanisms.product_features: emotion_companion and touch_interaction improve hardware consultations/ratings; high price can reduce conversion.
ground_truth_mechanisms.beta_test: treatment group has higher activation, retention, conversion, but not randomly perfect; selection bias may remain.

recommended_tests: Naive groupby vs fixed effects for account/platform confounding.
Series fatigue detection using series_id and time order.
Product variant feature analysis using feature_tags.
Beta test uplift analysis for treatment vs control.
Feedback topic clustering and roadmap generation.
